title: Grain cloud - polyphonic grain cloud (GrainflowLib)
subtitle: two clouds scattered over a recorded buffer

knobs.Pitch: grain transpose (+V/Oct, MIDI); Alt = select loop slot (SD)
knobs.Position: cloud centre position in the buffer
knobs.Size: position spray (spread of grain start points)

pads.Play: Alt+Play: record live input into this deck (toggle)
pads.Reverse: Alt+Rev: record live input into this deck (toggle)

switches.Mode (L/C/R): grain direction: top reverse / centre forward / down random
